title: What is he holding
wikitext:
[]: What is he holding?             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Jul 12, 2006 5:49 pm Ok this has bothered me for a long time. When I bought the manga 9 of eva I bought the Japanese version mainly cuz I couldnt wait for the american version. well i never bought the american verison and I would like to know one thing about the pic below. What the fuck is Kaworu holding and why is Shinji so afraid of it?Thanks so much!!!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 12, 2006 5:54 pm Soap.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 12, 2006 5:57 pm Kaworu only has the stub end of a bar of soap, and is asking Shinji to bend over and pick up some more. OK, I added the bend over bit, but that's how he's reacting Stage 62. Check the translations http://www.evamonkey.com/stage_translations/

[]:             Quote Post by Light of the Dawn » Fri Jul 14, 2006 4:23 am Soap? It looks like the missing part of Shinji's cock.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 6:14 am So Shin-Chan's Jewish now?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Jul 14, 2006 6:41 am *sigh* All we have here is up until volume 7. Had to support the national scene.
